subcodes.first_line: I commune with Thee, O Thou Deliverer of them that call in the darkness of night, and make mention of Thee in my mornings and evenings, and beseech Thee, O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اناجیک یا مناجی الناجی فی جنح اللیالی و اذکرک فی صباحی و مساای و اتضرع الیک یا
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
